'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 27''' was the twenty-seventh issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[July 3]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Strategy
*[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
*[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]
*[[Mara Jade Skywalker]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - [[Lars]] [[Moisture farm/Legends|Moisture farm]]
*[[DUM-series pit droid/Legends|Pit Droids]]
*[[Bantha-II cargo skiff/Legends|Desert Skiff]]
